title: Doom SSG Over Crossbow
body:
The textures and sounds included within this pack have been sourced from their original work "DOOM II" (available for purchase on [STEAM](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2300/DOOM_II/) and [GOG](https://www.gog.com/en/game/doom_ii)) created by [id Software](https://www.idsoftware.com/en-us).



This pack includes a full (relatively high effort) replacement of the crossbow with the iconic DOOM super-shotgun.

Includes:
- properly aligned first person view.
- fully featured reloading animation from the original game.
- third person view using the pickup icon from the original game.
- all sounds, properly aligned with the reload and firing effects.
- replacements for a few achievements and the name of the item.
- proper sound functionality with quick charge enchantments.



If I ever make anything else like this, it will be in a separate pack. I just keep it real like that, no need to worry about abhorrent updates ruining a funny resource pack.

Special thanks to [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) for the beautiful pillager featured in the images.
